programs.title: How the Universe Works
programs.desc: As the two Voyager spacecraft reach interstellar space, experts explore their astonishing discoveries and how their extended operation has transformed into the ultimate mission.

programs.title: How the Universe Works
programs.desc: Cosmic rays capable of destroying human DNA are hurtling through outer space like subatomic bullets, causing space crews radiation damage.

programs.title: Shipwreck Secrets
programs.sub_title: Bermuda Triangle: Hunt for the Cotopaxi
programs.desc: The disappearance of the SS Cotopaxi help launch the legend of the Bermuda Triangle; a team of experts follow fresh leads with cutting-edge tech to investigate if a mysterious wreck off the coast of Florida is indeed the long-lost ship.

programs.title: Shipwreck Secrets
programs.desc: When a sister ship of the Titanic gets embroiled in war with a hidden enemy, the former luxury liner is sent to the bottom of the ocean; new discoveries and cutting-edge underwater technology might finally reveal the secret history of its sinking.

programs.title: Shipwreck Secrets
programs.desc: New evidence in the Bermuda Triangle could reveal that Nazis got closer to America than ever believed; using the latest cutting-edge underwater technology, experts investigate the truth behind the shipwreck that shouldn't exist.

programs.title: Shipwreck Secrets
programs.desc: New discoveries reveal the treasures of a ghost fleet of Japanese ships at the bottom of the South Pacific, and using cutting-edge underwater technology, experts investigate a top-secret superweapon that could have changed the course of World War II.
